name: axure-to-markdown
description: 将 Axure RP 发布的 HTML 原型自动转换为结构化 Markdown 文档，供 AI 消费

scripts.sync:skill: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),d='skills/generating-prd/scripts/lib';fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});'config readers parser generator utils axure-vm extractors images'.split(' ').forEach(m=>{fs.copyFileSync(p.join('src',m+'.js'),p.join(d,m+'.js'));console.log('  '+m+'.js')});fs.copyFileSync('prompts/prd-generator.md','skills/generating-prd/prompts/prd-generator.md');console.log('synced')"
